title: Google cloud skills boost
content: - The [Google Cloud Skills Boost](https://www.cloudskillsboost.google/journeys/118) is a learning path that provides an introduction to generative AI concepts from the fundamentals of [[large language models]] to responsible AI principles. It offers 5 [[Courses and Training]], each featuring introductory-level microlearning that touches on different topics such as what generative AI is, why responsible AI is important, and how to apply AI principles with Google Cloud. Additionally, learners can earn a skill badge upon passing the final quiz which showcases their understanding of foundational generative AI concepts.
